notes: Solid Frogger implementation with all core mechanics (logs, turtles, vehicles, homes, lives, timer, levels), good visual polish and audio, but the death/lives logic has an off-by-one issue (lives-- after checking lives>0 means you get an extra life), and the touch controls are rudimentary rather than swipe-based.
Solid Frogger structure with scoring and hazards, but life-loss/game-over handling appears off by one, home layer drawing is duplicated, and use of roundRect may break on some canvases.
